command:
sed -i 's/^\*\*Plans\*\*: TBD/**Plans:** 3 plans

Plans:
- [ ] 10-01-PLAN.md — SEO metadata on all pages (title, description, OG tags)
- [ ] 10-02-PLAN.md — OG image and robots.txt static assets
- [ ] 10-03-PLAN.md — Vercel deployment config and custom 404 page/' .planning/ROADMAP.md

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs commit "docs(10): create phase plan — SEO metadata, OG image, Vercel config, 404 page" --files .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-01-PLAN.md .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-02-PLAN.md .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-03-PLAN.md .planning/ROADMAP.md

git add src/app/layout.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(10-01): add root layout metadata template with OG defaults and metadataBase

- Add metadataBase for relative OG image paths
- Add title template '%s | MultiRotter' for child pages
- Add openGraph with og-image.png, type, and siteName
- Add twitter card summary_large_image
- Add robots index/follow
- Keep existing manifest reference
"

test -f public/og-image.png && test -f public/robots.txt && echo "PASS" || echo "FAIL"
ls -la public/og-image.png
grep "User-agent" public/robots.txt && echo "User-agent found"
grep "Disallow: /api/" public/robots.txt && echo "Disallow /api/ found"
cat public/robots.txt

git add public/og-image.png public/robots.txt scripts/generate-og-image.mjs && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(10-02): add OG image and robots.txt for SEO

- 1200x630 solid #71B7E6 PNG generated via pure Node.js (no canvas dependency)
- robots.txt allows all public pages, blocks /api/ and /auth/ paths
- Includes sitemap reference for multirotter.vercel.app
"

TASK_COMMIT=$(git -C /c/Code/MultiRotter rev-parse --short HEAD)
echo "Commit: $TASK_COMMIT"
PLAN_END_EPOCH=$(date +%s)
PLAN_START_EPOCH=1774380860
DURATION=$(( PLAN_END_EPOCH - PLAN_START_EPOCH ))
echo "Duration: ${DURATION}s"

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state update-progress 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-metric --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --plan "02" --duration "1" --tasks "1" --files "3" 2>&1

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state add-decision --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --summary "Pure Node.js buffer + zlib deflate for PNG generation — avoids canvas/sharp dependency for single static image" 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 10-02-PLAN.md" 2>&1

git add src/app/page.tsx src/app/forum/\[forumId\]/page.tsx src/app/thread/\[threadId\]/page.tsx src/app/news/page.tsx src/app/headlines/page.tsx src/app/auth/login/page.tsx src/app/auth/register/page.tsx src/app/profile/\[userId\]/page.tsx src/app/offline/page.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(10-01): add SEO metadata to all page files

- Homepage: title, description, OG tags
- News/Headlines: static metadata with description
- Auth login/register: typed Metadata with description and OG
-

grep -q "metadataBase" src/app/layout.tsx && echo "PASS: metadataBase" && grep -q "template" src/app/layout.tsx && echo "PASS: template" && grep -q "openGraph" src/app/layout.tsx && echo "PASS: openGraph" && grep -q "og-image.png" src/app/layout.tsx && echo "PASS: og-image.png"

git -C /c/Code/MultiRotter add .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-02-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md && git -C /c/Code/MultiRotter commit --no-verify -m "docs(10-02): complete OG image and robots.txt plan

- public/og-image.png (1200x630 #71B7E6 PNG) and robots.txt created
- STATE.md advanced to plan 2 of 3, 94% overall progress
- ROADMAP.md updated with phase 10 plan progress
"

grep -q "metadata" src/app/page.tsx && echo "PASS: page.tsx metadata" && grep -q "generateMetadata" "src/app/forum/[forumId]/page.tsx" && echo "PASS: forum generateMetadata" && grep -q "generateMetadata" "src/app/thread/[threadId]/page.tsx" && echo "PASS: thread generateMetadata" && grep -q "metadata" src/app/news/page.tsx && echo "PASS: news metadata" && grep -q "metadata" src/app/headlines/page.tsx && echo "PASS: headlines metadata" && grep -q "description" src/app/auth/login/page.tsx && echo

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state update-progress 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-metric --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --plan "01" --duration "2" --tasks "2" --files "10" 2>&1

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state add-decision --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --summary "Child page titles omit site name suffix — root layout template appends it automatically; OG titles include suffix since template does not apply to OG fields" 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 10-01-PLAN.md" 2>&1
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap update-plan-progress 10 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs requirements mark-complete POLISH-01 2>&1

git add .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-01-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(10-01): complete SEO metadata plan

- Add 10-01-SUMMARY.md
- Advance plan counter to 3/3 in STATE.md
- Update ROADMAP.md phase 10 progress
"
node -e "const v = require('./vercel.json'); console.log(v.buildCommand ? 'PASS: buildCommand=' + v.buildCommand : 'FAIL')"

git add vercel.json && git commit --no-verify -m "chore(10-03): add Vercel deployment configuration

- buildCommand: pnpm build (uses --webpack flag required by Serwist)
- Service worker headers: no-cache and Service-Worker-Allowed scope
- Manifest content-type header for webmanifest
"

test -f src/app/not-found.tsx && echo "PASS: file exists" && grep -q "Page Not Found" src/app/not-found.tsx && echo "PASS: Page Not Found text" && grep -q "HeaderBar" src/app/not-found.tsx && echo "PASS: HeaderBar imported" && grep -q "metadata" src/app/not-found.tsx && echo "PASS: metadata exported"

git add src/app/not-found.tsx && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(10-03): add custom 404 not-found page in retro Rotter aesthetic

- Server component with HeaderBar, BlueNavBar, OrangeNavBar layout chrome
- Table-based layout matching forum style with #71B7E6 header and #FDFDFD content
- Link back to homepage in Rotter blue (#000099)
- Exports metadata with title and description
"

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state update-progress 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-metric --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --plan "03" --duration "8" --tasks "2" --files "2" 2>&1

node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state add-decision --phase "10-polish-and-launch" --summary "vercel.json: no env vars in file — all secrets set in Vercel dashboard; not-found.tsx is a server component with retro table 404 layout" 2>&1 && node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs state record-session --stopped-at "Completed 10-polish-and-launch plan 03 (10-03-PLAN.md)" 2>&1
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs requirements mark-complete POLISH-02 POLISH-03 POLISH-04 2>&1

git add .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-03-SUMMARY.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/ROADMAP.md && git commit --no-verify -m "docs(10-03): complete Vercel config and custom 404 page plan

- vercel.json with pnpm build and PWA asset headers
- Custom 404 not-found page in retro Rotter aesthetic
- Phase 10 progress updated to 3/3 plans complete (100%)
"

# Discovery check
PHASE_DIR="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch"
for per_plan in "${PHASE_DIR}"/DISCOVERED-*.md; do
  [ -f "$per_plan" ] && { cat "$per_plan" >> "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md"; rm "$per_plan"; echo "Merged"; }
done
[ -f "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md" ] && grep -c "^## Issue:" "${PHASE_DIR}/DISCOVERED.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "0 discovered issues"

git add .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/phases/10-polish-and-launch/10-VERIFICATION.md && \
git commit --no-verify -m "docs(phase-10): complete polish and launch — all 10 phases done"

# Clean up autonomous session files
rm -f /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-session-counter /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.blocker-retries.tmp /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-original-mode.tmp /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous.lock
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs config-set workflow._auto_chain_active false 2>/dev/null
echo "Cleanup done"

# Final stats
echo "=== Git Stats ==="
git log --oneline | head -40
echo "---"
echo "Total commits: $(git log --oneline | wc -l)"
echo "=== File Stats ==="
find /c/Code/MultiRotter/src -type f -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" | wc -l
echo "source files"
find /c/Code/MultiRotter/src -type f -name "*.test.*" | wc -l
echo "test files"
echo "=== Routes ==="
npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | grep "├\|└" | wc -l
echo "routes"
az account list --query "[].{name:name, id:id, state:state}" -o table 2>&1
az account set --subscription "Pay-As-You-Go Dev/Test" && az account show --query "{name:name, id:id}" -o json

# Check for existing resource groups
az group list --query "[].name" -o tsv 2>&1 | head -10
az resource list --resource-group anglo-rotter-rg --query "[].{name:name, type:type}" -o table 2>&1

az staticwebapp show --name anglo-rotter-pwa --resource-group anglo-rotter-rg --query "{name:name, defaultHostname:defaultHostname, sku:sku.name, location:location, repositoryUrl:repositoryUrl}" -o json 2>&1

# Get deployment token
DEPLOY_TOKEN=$(az staticwebapp secrets list --name anglo-rotter-pwa --resource-group anglo-rotter-rg --query "properties.apiKey" -o tsv 2>&1)
echo "Token length: ${#DEPLOY_TOKEN}"

# Check if swa cli is installed
npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli --version 2>&1 | head -3

# Build the app first for static export
# SWA needs a static export for Next.js - check if we have output: 'export' in next.config
grep -E "output|export" /c/Code/MultiRotter/next.config.ts 2>/dev/null

# Build the app
npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | tail -10

# SWA supports Next.js hybrid (SSR) apps natively
# Deploy using SWA CLI with the deployment token
DEPLOY_TOKEN=$(az staticwebapp secrets list --name anglo-rotter-pwa --resource-group anglo-rotter-rg --query "properties.apiKey" -o tsv 2>&1)

npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli deploy \
  --app-location "/c/Code/MultiRotter" \
  --output-location ".next" \
  --deployment-token "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" \
  --env production \
  2>&1 | tail -30

# Check if there's a standalone output we can use
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/.next/standalone/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No standalone output"
# Check static pages
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/.next/static/ 2>/dev/null | head -5

# Rebuild with standalone output
npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | tail -15

# Get deployment token
DEPLOY_TOKEN=$(az staticwebapp secrets list --name anglo-rotter-pwa --resource-group anglo-rotter-rg --query "properties.apiKey" -o tsv 2>&1)

# Deploy with correct Next.js hybrid config
npx @azure/static-web-apps-cli deploy \
  "/c/Code/MultiRotter" \
  --deployment-token "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" \
  --env production \
  --verbose \
  2>&1 | tail -40
